document.source_title: WHO and France shift One Health vision to action with new high-impact initiatives

claims.claim_text: WHO and France announced a new wave of concrete actions to better protect people, animals and the planet from future health crises.
claims.evidence_text: On World Health Day, global leaders gathered in France for a milestone 'One Health Summit', where the World Health Organization (WHO) and partners announced a new wave of concrete actions to better protect people, animals and the planet from future health crises.

entities.name: World Health Organization
entities.description: The directing and coordinating authority for health within the United Nations system.
entities.evidence_text: the World Health Organization (WHO) and partners announced a new wave of concrete actions

entities.name: France
entities.description: Country hosting the One Health Summit.
entities.evidence_text: Hosted by France, the Summit marks a major step forward

entities.name: Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus
entities.evidence_text: "The health of people, animals and the environment we share are inextricably interwoven..." said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus

entities.name: Emmanuel Macron
entities.description: President of the Republic of France.
entities.evidence_text: "One Health is not just about protecting health, it is about recognizing that we live as one system..." said Emmanuel Macron

events.evidence_text: On World Health Day, global leaders gathered in France for a milestone 'One Health Summit'

events.event: Global Forum of WHO Collaborating Centres
actors: ministers from Germany, Indonesia and South Africa
events.evidence_text: Alongside the Summit, WHO is kicking off its first Global Forum of WHO Collaborating Centres (CCs), taking place from 7–9 April.

metrics.name: COVID-19 deaths
metrics.evidence_text: The COVID-19 pandemic alone resulted in an estimated 15 million deaths

metrics.name: Rabies deaths
metrics.evidence_text: a disease that still kills nearly 60 000 people each year

relationships.subject: WHO
relationships.evidence_text: WHO thanks France for hosting this Summit

relationships.subject: WHO
relationships.evidence_text: WHO is also assuming the Chairmanship of the Quadripartite collaboration

citations.title: WHO and France shift One Health vision to action with new high-impact initiatives

source_credibility.reason: Source is the World Health Organization, a recognized authority in global health.
